# Zepoul Ayiti (GL Zepoul Peyi)

Official website: https://zepoulayiti.com/
Primary language: French (fr)
Business type: Egg production and wholesale supply in Haiti
Current production: 500 eggs per day
Growth objective: expansion toward 50,000 laying hens

## What we offer
- Local egg production in Haiti
- Fresh eggs supply for hotels, restaurants, supermarkets, distributors and merchants
- Wholesale egg orders and recurring supply planning
- Priority contact through WhatsApp and quote requests

## Contact
- Email: info@zepoulayiti.com
- Website: https://zepoulayiti.com/
